title: Training Budget and Professional Development Request Process
text:
Q: How do I request funding for training and professional development?
A: Employees can request funding for training and professional development through our formal request process. To initiate a request, complete the Professional Development Request Form available on the HR portal. Ensure that you provide details about the training program, its relevance to your role, and the estimated costs. Submit your completed form to your direct supervisor for initial approval. Once approved, your supervisor will forward the request to the HR department for final review. Please allow 2-4 weeks for processing. If approved, you will receive a confirmation email outlining the funding details. For any questions or assistance, contact the HR team at hr@company.com.
